@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@ - * Copyright (c) 2000, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. + * Copyright (c) 2000, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. @@ -178,5 +178,5 @@ - *

Normalization is the process of removing unnecessary {@code "."} - * and {@code ".."} segments from the path component of a hierarchical URI. - * Each {@code "."} segment is simply removed. A {@code ".."} segment is - * removed only if it is preceded by a non-{@code ".."} segment. - * Normalization has no effect upon opaque URIs. + *

Normalization is the process of removing unnecessary {@code "."}, + * {@code ".."}, and {@code "//"} (empty) segments from the path component of a + * hierarchical URI. Each {@code "."} and empty segment is simply removed. A + * {@code ".."} segment is removed only if it is preceded by a non-{@code ".."} + * segment. Normalization has no effect upon opaque URIs. @@ -1033,0 +1033,3 @@ + *

  • All {@code "//"} empty segments are removed. + * (Deviation from RFC 2396)

    • + *
